release_notes: V14.39 build 185 WiFi/Nightscout priority and 24h trend patch: changes the 24-hour Trend and Insulin Activity history window to 10-minute spacing, keeps 8h and 12h at 5-minute spacing, preserves the 1-hour main glucose trend as a separate FIFO buffer, uses actual Nightscout entry timestamps for the 1-hour trend, and prioritizes latest glucose recovery after WiFi reconnect before lower-priority history, insulin, IOB and device-status HTTPS calls.
